title: Monday.com API is not good
excerpt: I am truly shocked at the terrible state of the api. I have worked with the APIs for many different work management tools and by far, the Monday.com api is the most needlessly complicated and inconsistent one I have deal…

posts.author: skyfox (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: I am truly shocked at the terrible state of the api. I have worked with the APIs for many different work management tools and by far, the Monday.com api is the most needlessly complicated and inconsistent one I have dealt with. GraphQL is a strange decision for this API. But the constant changes and “updates” are enough to make me reconsider the platform all together for our project.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @skyfox and welcome to the community!

If you want to send us some specific requests and feedback about our API, we will be happy to share them with our R&D team so that they can be considered!

For that, please send an email to appsupport@monday.com so we can have this feedback in our system and share it with the relevant teams

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: The only set of breaking changes in three years is “constant”? Please elaborate.
